;<span id="Repetition_category">repetition category<span>
:number that represents the repetition number corresponding to a given [[Glossary:Interval|interval]] in the theoretical learning process in which the current status of the [[Glossary:OF_matrix|OF matrix]] is used. If you make many [[Glossary:Repetition|repetitions]] in short [[Glossary:Interval|intervals]] (e.g. as a result of [[Glossary:Mid-interval_repetition|mid-interval review]]), you may have a large repetition number for a short [[Glossary:Interval|interval]]. Such repetition number cannot be used in the SuperMemo Algorithm. Instead, [[Glossary:SuperMemo|SuperMemo]] will look at the [[Glossary:Optimum_interval|optimum interval]] and see how many times an [[Glossary:Item|item]] would need to be repeated to reach that [[Glossary:Interval|interval]]. That number is called the '''repetition category'''
